brand_sub: info portal · any country · no fluff

cta_pools._note: Sandwich: hook + assistant(L1) + voice_lead+voice(L2) + ps(off-topic easter egg). L1=answers for your specific case from recent first-hand reports; L2=live voice translator; PS=same translator in an unexpected live scene. Broad (not expat-only). 'for you/your case', not 'about us'. No money/limits here. L1/L2 by intent or rotate; PS random.
hook: Need it for your situation, not in general?
Generic articles exist — but a solution for you?
Want an answer for you, not a lecture for everyone?
Dug through search and still unsure?
Answers dance around it, but never to the point?
Everywhere the same, but your case is special?
Still don't know what to do in your case?
Tired of googling the same thing?
assistant: answers for your case, from recent reports, not generic articles
gives what you actually need: real experience of people who went through it
builds the answer from fresh first-hand reports, not marketing copy
not generic articles, but specifics for your situation
what search won't show and not every blogger will tell
fresh reports, not a five-year-old article
talks like someone just back from there — no fluff
from people's recent experience, not from manuals
tries to understand your situation and answer more precisely
tells you what works right now — from recent reports
